intent: Authorize two governance-contained workflow mutations: (1) merge-governance-check.yml — exempt governance/merge-legitimacy/merge_proof_registry.jsonl from governance_mutation classification; it is an append-only proof evidence surface, not a governance primitive. (2) governance-mutation-authorization.yml — add PREFLIGHT step to detect WORKER_URL redirects before the /session call, diagnosing the HTTP 302 failure without leaking secrets or following redirects to unvalidated hosts.
